news.title: Microsoft rolls back some of its Copilot AI bloat on Windows
news.snippet: The company is reducing Copilot entry points on Windows, starting with Photos, Widgets, Notepad, and other apps.

news.title: Trump takes another shot at dismantling state AI regulation
news.snippet: The Trump administration on Friday unveiled its new legislative blueprint for AI regulation, and the seven-point plan includes a clear message: The federal government should avoid many AI regulations

news.title: WordPress.com now lets AI agents write and publish posts, and more
news.snippet: New AI agents on WordPress.com could lower barriers to publishing while increasing machine-generated content across the web.

news.title: Trump’s AI framework targets state laws, shifts child safety burden to parents
news.snippet: Trump’s AI framework pushes federal preemption of state laws, emphasizes innovation, and shifts responsibility for child safety toward parents while laying out lighter-touch rules for tech companies.

news.title: Google Search is now using AI to replace headlines

news.title: Amazon is making an Alexa phone
news.snippet: Over 10 years after shelving the Fire Phone, Amazon is reportedly planning to launch another smartphone, this time focused on Alexa. According to Reuters, the phone, which is code-named "Transformer,"

news.title: Why people really hate AI

news.title: The best AI investment might be in energy tech
news.snippet: Power has become one of the biggest bottlenecks in rolling out new AI data centers. That's creating an opening for investors.

news.title: These AI notetaking devices can help you record and transcribe your meetings
news.snippet: These physical notetakers transcribe audio and give users summaries and action items of meetings using AI. Some even offer live translation.

news.title: OpenAI is planning a desktop ‘superapp’

news.title: Jeff Bezos reportedly wants $100 billion to buy and transform old manufacturing firms with AI
news.snippet: The Amazon magnate has a new project centered around acquiring industrial firms and revamping them with AI technology.

news.title: Online bot traffic will exceed human traffic by 2027, Cloudflare CEO says
news.snippet: AI bots may outnumber humans online by 2027, says Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince, as generative AI agents dramatically increase web traffic and infrastructure demands.

news.title: A rogue AI led to a serious security incident at Meta
news.snippet: For almost two hours last week, Meta employees had unauthorized access to company and user data thanks to an AI agent that gave an employee inaccurate technical advice, as previously reported by The I

news.title: Meta rolls out new AI content enforcement systems while reducing reliance on third-party vendors
news.snippet: Meta believes these AI systems can detect more violations with greater accuracy, better prevent scams, respond more quickly to real-world events, and reduce over-enforcement.

news.title: DoorDash launches a new ‘Tasks’ app that pays couriers to submit videos to train AI
news.snippet: Delivery couriers will be able to earn money by completing activities like filming everyday tasks or recording themselves speaking in another language.

news.title: TechCrunch Startup Battlefield 200 nominations are still open
news.snippet: Nominate your startup, or one you know, for TechCrunch Startup Battlefield 200 before May 27. Chance to win $100,000 equity-free funding and VC access.

news.title: Amazon brings Alexa+ to the UK
news.snippet: The company is currently letting users in the U.K. try out Alexa+ for free via an early access program.

news.title: Fitbit’s AI health coach will soon be able to read your medical records

news.title: Multiverse Computing pushes its compressed AI models into the mainstream

news.title: Meta is having trouble with rogue AI agents
news.snippet: A rogue AI agent inadvertently exposed Meta company and user data to engineers who didn't have permission to see it.
